entities.name: 智能体循环 (agent loop)

entities.name: Heroku
entities.how_described: 本集指出其微小核心是极简的「Git Push」部署命令，虽被 Kubernetes 取代，但在用户体验上依然令人怀念。

evidence.quote: He ran the design team at Heroku.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: In the past life, I worked at Heroku and Kubernetes was much more successful than Heroku, even though I think from a user experience perspective, it was much worse.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: But the delta was Heroku was saying, "Hey, we're going to replace your ops team."
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: At Heroku, for sure, I think it was the Git Push Heroku master of ... at the time it was really hard to deploy apps.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: It's sad because people don't remember Heroku.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: Git Push Heroku master was just this very simple one-liner that went from the thing on my computer, now I have a URL, and that's so intoxicating that everything else flows from there.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

entities.name: Anthropic
entities.how_described: 本集提到它虽起步晚、资金少，但成功打造了出色的模型，并讨论了其内部重度依赖 Slack 作为操作系统的现象。

evidence.quote: What do OpenAI, Anthropic, Cursor, Vercel, Replit, Sierra, Clay, and hundreds of other winning companies all have in common?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: One of the funniest things that I see again and again, I just had the head of product for Claude Code on the podcast, Cat Wu, and she talks about how Slack is basically the OS for Anthropic.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: No, people at Anthropic, their time is better spent on building AGI than trying to build better Slack.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: If I look at the really, really fast models like Spark, and I forget what the Anthropic variant is where-
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: I would assume they pale in comparison to the folks at OpenAI and Anthropic just by the nature of the work they do and so on.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: In general, I really, really dislike the rivalry discourse that exists in Silicon Valley, which is for Anthropic to win, OpenAI needs to lose and vice versa and that kind of thing.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: I think speaking of models, a good example is Anthropic, which was way behind, started after OpenAI, got less funding and now is just killing it and dominating.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: OpenAI
entities.how_described: 本集作为前沿实验室的代表被提及，讨论了当前几大实验室之间互相竞争的格局。

evidence.quote: What do OpenAI, Anthropic, Cursor, Vercel, Replit, Sierra, Clay, and hundreds of other winning companies all have in common?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I would assume they pale in comparison to the folks at OpenAI and Anthropic just by the nature of the work they do and so on.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: In general, I really, really dislike the rivalry discourse that exists in Silicon Valley, which is for Anthropic to win, OpenAI needs to lose and vice versa and that kind of thing.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: I think speaking of models, a good example is Anthropic, which was way behind, started after OpenAI, got less funding and now is just killing it and dominating.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I don't know who to give credit, but obviously, you give the CEO a bunch of credit, but like Dario is that he wasn't ... Oh, he wasn't just lucky once at OpenAI.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0
